hero.title: go-i2p
hero.subtitle: Ekosistema ng I2P networking para sa Go — mga router, SAM library, tunnel, crypto, at mga tool.
callout.desc: Ang go-i2p router ay hindi pa magagamit. Gamitin ang i2pd (C++) o Java I2P para sa produksyon.
callout.libs: Ang mga library ng koneksyon (onramp, goSam, sam3) ay stable na at gumagana sa anumang I2P router.
cat.git.note: patakbuhin ang Git services sa I2P
desc.goSam: HTTP proxy sa ~50 linya. Simple, nako-customize.
desc.sam3: Buong SAMv3.3. Lahat ng opsyon, lahat ng detalye.
desc.go-sam-go: Na-refactor na sam3. Sinusuportahan ang Primary session.
desc.go-i2p: Purong Go I2P router. 97★. Hindi pa magagamit.
desc.common: Shared library na inihiwalay mula sa router.
desc.go-noise: Noise Protocol Framework para sa NTCP2.
desc.i2pkeys: I2P key handling. Ginagamit ng onramp/goSam/sam3.
desc.su3: SU3 format library na may signature verification.
desc.go-i2ptunnel: I2PTunnel para sa Go. Pamalit sa sam-forwarder.
desc.go-meta-dialer: Unified dialer para sa clearnet, onion, at I2P.
desc.go-forward: Malinis na API para sa network forwarding/conversion.
desc.go-docker-network-i2p: Docker network driver na may I2P.
desc.go-streaming: I2P streaming sa pamamagitan ng go-i2cp + seqs.
desc.go-datagrams: I2P datagrams sa pamamagitan ng go-i2cp + seqs.
desc.i2ptui: TUI para sa pamamahala ng I2P (BubbleTea).
desc.go-i2p-teaui: I2PControl TUI na ginawa gamit ang BubbleTea.
desc.go-i2p-bt: BitTorrent library para sa I2P. Katulad ng I2PSnark.
desc.railroad: Blog engine na may Ghost theme.
desc.i2p-stats: Reader at tagapagtipon ng router stats.
desc.gitlab-to-gitea: I-migrate ang repo mula GitLab papuntang Gitea.
desc.i2p-control: CLI para sa I2PControl. Demo ng go-i2pcontrol.
desc.util: Mga utility function na hindi nabibilang sa iba.
desc.checki2cp: Suriin ang I2CP availability. CLI + library.
maturity.onramp: mature, implements SAMv3.3, Streaming and Datagrams
maturity.go-sam-go: mature, implements SAMv3.3, Streaming and Datagrams
maturity.go-i2pcontrol: mature but does not provide all possible consts (like ratestats)
section.interface_note: Connection libraries act as drop-in replacements for net.Conn and net.PacketConn in your Go code. When used correctly, they make it easy to adapt Go applications to I2P.
section.quickstart.note: Requires a running I2P router (i2pd or Java I2P). See onramp for full docs.
status.ready.title: ✅ Production Ready
status.ready.desc: Connection libraries (onramp, goSam, sam3) are stable and work with any I2P router. The Streaming and Datagram APIs are reliable.
status.dev.title: 🔧 In Development
status.dev.desc: The core router (go-i2p) is operational but not production-safe. I2CP, Streaming, and Datagram client libraries are functional but APIs may change between 0.1.x and 0.2.0.
status.advice.title: 📋 For Developers
status.advice.desc: The API below onramp is unstable. Use high-level libraries to minimize churn. See the router README for detailed status.
